_note: This file is a design-time snapshot and may be out of date. For current step state, run: iw item-status <ID> --json. The DB is the authoritative source of truth (CR-00023).
title: Multi-tab AI Assistant on OpenCode

steps.description: Create chat_tabs table via Alembic revision (UUID PK, text runtime/status with code-only allowlists, project_id FK ON DELETE CASCADE, two indexes)
QV: Alembic migration round-trip + drift check
Define ChatRuntime ABC; move OpenCode plumbing into orch/chat/opencode/ subpackage; rekey RelayManager by tab_id; add tab_service.py (CRUD + soft-cap + soft-delete + reopen + bootstrap-default)
Per-agent code review of S03 (ABC contract, package move correctness, soft-cap/soft-delete semantics, RelayManager tab_id rekey, bootstrap idempotency)
Rewrite dashboard/routers/chat.py to tab-scoped surface (11 endpoints, X-Tab-Soft-Cap-Exceeded header, Last-Event-ID SSE replay preserved); remove old /api/chat/sessions/* endpoints
Tab strip + create-tab modal + per-tab controls + per-tab EventSource lifecycle + soft-cap warning banner + recent-closed dropdown + per-tab model dropdown
Unit tests (3 files) + integration tests (4 files) + adapt existing chat tests to tab-scoped surface (no deletions)

Cross-agent global review: DB↔backend↔API↔frontend↔tests integration boundaries; ABC contract honoured; event tab_id field present at every emit site; default-tab bootstrap fires exactly once per project on first load
QV: Browser verification — open 2 tabs with different models, send prompts, abort one, reload page, close+reopen a tab via recent-closed menu
Self-assessment of the just-completed item via the iw-item-analyze skill
